    Class
    Description
    ElevenLabsApi
    Client for the ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech API.
    ElevenLabsApi.SpeechRequest.PronunciationDictionaryLocator
    Locator for a pronunciation dictionary.
    ElevenLabsApi.SpeechRequest.TextNormalizationMode
    Text normalization mode.
    ElevenLabsApi.SpeechRequest.VoiceSettings
    Voice settings to override defaults for the given voice.
